name: 5' x 7' Outdoor Rug Western Diamond - Threshold™
description:
The Outdoor Western Diamond Rug from Threshold™ offers an easy way to beautify your patio, porch or deck. This all-weather rug is great for outdoor use, and it combines chic style with comfortable cushioning underfoot and easy care (just rinse with a hose). The rectangular outdoor rug is decked out in bands of horizontal stripes in white over a textured black background, and has oversized diamond motifs running in a vertical row down the center for an eye-catching modern look. Plus, the geo-pattern rug has a spray latex backing to help keep it in place wherever you choose to arrange it.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
